items.description: A blunted training blade for recruits.

items.name: Hand Axe
items.description: A simple woodcutter’s axe pressed into battle.
items.lore: A simple woodcutter’s axe pressed into battle.

items.description: A short utility knife used in sparring.
items.lore: A short utility knife used in sparring.

items.lore: A smith’s hammer, heavy enough to bruise.

items.description: A pointed stick bound with rawhide.
items.lore: A pointed stick bound with rawhide.

items.description: An oversized training blade meant for practice swings.
items.lore: An oversized training blade meant for practice swings.

items.name: Apprentice Wand

items.lore: A novice’s wand that flickers with raw magic. Branches into fire, frost, holy, arcane, and lightning staves at T1.

items.lore: A living branch that roots the wielder to the earth.
